name: Red5 Pro
description: Red5 Pro — sub-500ms live streaming and WebRTC media server

seo.title: Red5 Pro — Object Storage / Media API
seo.meta_description: Red5 Pro: Red5 Pro — sub-500ms live streaming and WebRTC media server

when_to_use: Sub-500ms live streaming via WebRTC and RTSP
Interactive live streaming at scale with two-way communication
Real-time video contribution with sub-second viewer delivery
Auction and gaming platforms needing frame-accurate live sync
Self-hosted or cloud real-time streaming without Millicast costs

cons: Java-based setup complex for non-JVM shops
review.verdict: Strong low-latency media server for teams with JVM ops chops — Millicast easier if you want managed.
review.best_for: Enterprises running interactive live video on their own infra with Java-friendly teams.
review.not_for: Teams wanting managed APIs — Mux or Millicast fit better.
